name: FileUpload
description: FileUpload is an advanced uploader with dragdrop support, multi file uploads, auto uploading, progress tracking and validations.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the request parameter to identify the files at backend.

props.name: url
props.description: Remote url to upload the files.

props.name: mode
props.description: Defines the UI of the component, possible values are 'advanced' and 'basic'.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Used to select multiple files at once from file dialog.

props.name: accept
props.description: Pattern to restrict the allowed file types such as 'image/*'.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the upload functionality.

props.name: auto
props.description: When enabled, upload begins automatically after selection is completed.

props.name: maxFileSize
props.description: Maximum file size allowed in bytes.

props.name: invalidFileSizeMessage
props.description: Message of the invalid fize size.
props.default: {0}: Invalid file size, file size should be smaller than {1.}

props.name: invalidFileLimitMessage
props.description: Message to display when number of files to be uploaded exceeeds the limit.
props.default: Maximum number of files to be uploaded is {0.}

props.name: invalidFileTypeMessage
props.description: Message of the invalid fize type.

props.name: fileLimit
props.description: Maximum number of files that can be uploaded.

props.name: withCredentials
props.description: Cross-site Access-Control requests should be made using credentials such as cookies, authorization headers or TLS client certificates.

props.name: previewWidth
props.description: Width of the image thumbnail in pixels.

props.name: chooseLabel
props.description: Label of the choose button. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: uploadLabel
props.description: Label of the upload button. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: cancelLabel
props.description: Label of the cancel button. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: customUpload
props.description: Whether to use the default upload or a manual implementation defined in uploadHandler callback. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: showUploadButton
props.description: Whether to show the upload button.

props.name: showCancelButton
props.description: Whether to show the cancel button.

props.name: chooseIcon
props.description: Icon of the choose button.

props.name: uploadIcon
props.description: Icon of the upload button.

props.name: cancelIcon
props.description: Icon of the cancel button.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline style of the component.

props.name: class
props.description: Style class of the component.

props.name: chooseButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the choose button inside the component.

props.name: uploadButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the upload button inside the component.

props.name: cancelButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the cancel button inside the component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: select
events.description: Callback to invoke when files are selected.

events.name: before-upload
events.description: Callback to invoke before file upload begins to customize the request such as post parameters before the files.

events.name: progress
events.description: Callback to invoke when files are being uploaded.

events.name: upload
events.description: Callback to invoke when file upload is complete.

events.name: uploader
events.description: Callback to invoke to implement a custom upload.

events.name: error
events.description: Callback to invoke if file upload fails.

events.name: before-send
events.description: Callback to invoke before file send begins to customize the request such as adding headers.

events.name: clear
events.description: Callback to invoke when files in queue are removed without uploading.

events.name: remove
events.description: Callback to invoke when a singe file is removed from the list.

events.name: removeUploadedFile
events.description: Callback to invoke when a single uploaded file is removed from the uploaded file list.

slots.name: header
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Files to upload. */ files: File[]; /** * Uploaded files. */ uploadedFiles: File[]; /** * Choose function */ chooseCallback: () => void; /** * Upload function */ uploadCallback: () => void; /** * Clear function */ clearCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: content
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Files to upload. */ files: File[]; /** * Uploaded files. */ uploadedFiles: File[]; /** * Function to remove an uploaded file. * @param {number} index - Index of the uploaded file */ removeUploadedFileCallback: (index: number) => void; /** * Function to remove a file. * @param {number} index - Index of the removed file */ removeFileCallback: (index: number) => void; /** * Uploaded progress as number. */ progress: number; /** * Status messages about upload process. */ messages: string[] | null; }): VNode[]

slots.name: empty
slots.description: Custom content when there is no selected file.

slots.name: fileremoveicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * File to upload. */ file: File; /** * The index of file */ index: number; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom remove icon template for each file.

slots.name: filelabel
slots.type: (scope: { /** * File to upload. */ files: File[]; }): VNode[]
